title: [Kraken's Fall, Way of the Wise]
description: Through a golden velvet curtain is a dim space lit by silver candles.  Gilded banners line this alcove as the way aggressively narrows opposite the entry.  At the confluence of these banners and the room's patchwork light, a raised stone dais arrayed with lit candles fronts a gem-set metal statue of a woman studying a scroll stretching from floor to ceiling.  Depicting a long-haired scholar in a flowing gown, additional carved scrolls rest piled at her feet.
